name: Chocolate Fondue2
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon cherry brandy, or 2 teaspoons instant coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the chocolate in the cream over low heat, stirring until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the brandy or instant coffee.
3. Pour into a fondue pot to keep warm.
